first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the written evaluations are substantively the same. The strengths and concerns listed in both versions are consistent, with only minor variations in phrasing that are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise. The core assessment of the candidate's skills and gaps (e.g., lack of C++ and cloud architecture experience) did not change after redaction, indicating the model was not relying on the removed personal or company information.
